package rulecoverage

func NegativePrometheusObserveWithoutTimer() string {
    ruleID := "prometheus_observe_without_timer"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "manual `time.Since(start).Seconds()` + `histogram.Observe(duration)` patterns when `prometheus.NewTimer` would be safer"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
